title: Maharani's Crisp Kenyan Cabbage Grill
description: Tangy, crisp, romantic Kenyan dish featuring caramelize yellow cabbage. Perfect for special occasions and dinner parties.

ingredients.name: Kale cabbage
ingredients.notes: Yellow food coloring may stain hands and surfaces.

instructions: Preheat raclette grill to medium heat.
Finely chop the kale cabbage, discarding any tough stalks.
Add yellow food coloring to cabbage and toss to coat.
Brush raclette grill with olive oil to prevent sticking.
Place cabbage on raclette grill and caramelize for 5 minutes on each side.
Cook until cabbage reaches a deep golden brown, stirring occasionally.
Transfer cabbage to a serving dish, sprinkle with brown sugar, balsamic vinegar, and red pepper flakes.
Top with raclette cheese, fresh parsley, and a squeeze of lemon juice.
Allow raclette grill to cool before cleaning.
Wash hands thoroughly after handling cabbage and food coloring, as they may stain skin and surfaces.
